title: SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. (SEDG) Stock Price, News, Quote & History - Yahoo Finance
text: SolarEdge Technologies Inc (SEDG) Stock Overview. Company Profile: SolarEdge Technologies is a designer and provider of vertex-level and string-level intelligent inverters for photovoltaic (PV) applications. The company also offers cloud-based monitoring services for residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar customers. Stock Performance: SEDG has experienced significant volatility throughout 2024 and 2025, reflecting the company's operational challenges and market dynamics. Revenue Trends: The company generates revenues from the sale of power optimizers, inverters, batteries, and related software and monitoring services. Margins: The company has struggled with margin pressure due to inventory write-downs, weak European demand, and pricing pressures. Long-term Outlook: Analysts remain cautious on the stock, with mixed sentiment regarding the company's recovery prospects.
